vibe: AAA Premium Sports Management Game (eFootball / FM style)

containers.glass_panel: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-md p-6 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]

buttons.primary: bg-[#00E676] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#00C853] transition-colors rounded-sm px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors rounded-sm px-6 py-3
buttons.danger: bg-transparent border border-[#FF3B30] text-[#FF3B30] hover:bg-[#FF3B30] hover:text-white transition-colors rounded-sm px-6 py-3

player_card.wrapper: relative overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-b from-[#1a1a1a] to-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-md p-4 flex flex-col items-center hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform cursor-pointer
player_card.rating: absolute top-2 right-2 text-xl font-heading text-[#FFD700]

tables.th: bg-[#121212] text-[#A0A0A0] text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.1em] py-3 px-4 border-b border-white/10
tables.td: py-4 px-4 border-b border-white/5 text-sm font-body text-white

navigation.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen w-20 md:w-64 bg-black border-r border-white/10 flex flex-col z-50
navigation.link_active: flex items-center gap-4 px-6 py-4 text-[#00E676] bg-white/5 border-r-2 border-[#00E676]
navigation.link_inactive: flex items-center gap-4 px-6 py-4 text-[#A0A0A0] hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors

manager_hq.layout: Full screen stadium background with heavy dark overlay. Bento grid for 'Next Match' (Hero span-full), 'League Standings' summary, 'Finances', and 'Inbox'.

squad_and_tactics.layout: Split view: Left 70% shows the 2D Pitch top-down graphic with player dots. Right 30% shows the substitute bench and tactic controls (sliders/selects).

match_live.layout: Massive Scoreboard at top. Middle area features a terminal-like auto-scrolling minute-by-minute text commentary. Bottom area for live tactical adjustments.

transfer_market.layout: Dense data tables with filters on the left sidebar. High contrast player rows. Highlights in gold for high overall ratings.

stadium_night.description: Aerial view of a night football match. Use as full page background with bg-black/80 overlay.

pitch_top_down.description: Top-down view of a soccer field. Use as the background for the tactical formation board.

locker_room.description: Locker room. Use as background for Team Selection or Squad screens.

accessibility_and_testing.test_id_rule: ALL interactive elements MUST have data-testid. Format: kebab-case, role-based. e.g. data-testid='start-match-btn'

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML + Tailwind for complex asymmetrical layouts like Manager HQ bento grid.
Use Shadcn UI for standard forms, selects, dialogs but override classes to match the dark glassmorphism theme.
Install and use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react for game menu icons.
For the pitch graphic, use relative positioning inside an aspect-ratio container with absolute positioned player dots.
Do NOT use pure #000000, use #0A0A0A for deepest backgrounds.
Embed Google Fonts: 'Bebas Neue' and 'Exo 2' in index.html or import in CSS.
